findings.title: Central reporting side effect is not covered
findings.impact: The new status command now performs a best-effort POST after listing workers, but the tests only validate the pure payload builder. A regression in report_status, such as not calling urlopen, using the wrong timeout or headers, or letting OSError escape and fail a read-only status command, would not be caught.
findings.fix: Add unit tests for Command.report_status with _read_cluster_token stubbed and urllib.request.urlopen mocked, covering the successful request shape and the OSError path that must only log a warning. Also cover Command.run invoking report_status for both empty and non-empty worker lists.
